text:
ありがとう！
引き受けてくれるのね？

今回はすごく抽象的な内容のお願いに
なっちゃってごめんなさい。

でも、どうしても思い浮かばなくて。
調達だけじゃなくて、あなたの知恵も
お借りしたいの。
大変だと思うけど、お願いね！
Great, you're gonna help me out again?

Sorry that this time around the request seems
a little more, let's say, abstract.

I just can't seem to figure out exactly what it
is I need. So this time I need to borrow both
your body and your mind.

I doubt this will be easy, but I'm counting on
you!
